--- title: "Lab 2: Feedback and Discussion" author: "Nicky Wakim" title-slide-attributes: data-background-color: "#C2352F" date: "04/30/2025" format: revealjs: theme: "../simple_NW.scss" chalkboard: true slide-number: true show-slide-number: all width: 1955 height: 1100 footer: "Lab 2: Feedback and Discussion" html-math-method: mathjax highlight-style: ayu execute: echo: true freeze: auto # re-render only when source changes --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Notes from me and the TAs - Using `ANY_HARDSHIP` or `MULT_HARDSHIPS` - If you look at the User Guide, this involves information from food security - Using "Survey Questions" - Be very careful of this! - Interpreting estimated ORs - If your main variable had >6 categories I'm sorry if you interpreted every single one - Make sure you are taking the inverse logit to find the predicted probability - Make sure you are plotting the predicted probability, not the ORs - The TAs left comments in the rubric! Please look at them! ## Get into groups of 2-4 - No more than 4! - Try to group with people with whos you do not already work on labs - Introduce yourself if you do not know each other - Share you html documents with each other (email, airdrop, etc.) ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
05:00
``` ::: ::: ## Introduce Research Question - Share your research question with each other! - Should be using the same outcome + your main variable - Share your other variables   ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
05:00
``` ::: ::: ## Double check code for variables - Did everyone code their variables correctly? - If you changed something to a factor, does it have the correct levels? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
10:00
``` ::: ::: ## Discuss your confounders/effect modifiers - Does not need to have a causal framework - Do you think we need to adjust for certain variables? - Do you think there will be interactions? - If you think there are interactions, try to narrow it down to 1-2 variables ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
10:00
``` ::: ::: ## Contingency tables + bivariate analysis - Based on your reasoning in the previous activity and the tables/plots, do you think we need to adjust for any variables? - What trends are you seeing? - Do you have any cells with low counts? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
10:00
``` ::: ::: ## Simple logistic regression - Does everyone have the correct interpretations of the estimated odds ratios? - What's your reference group? - What trends are you seeing? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
10:00
``` ::: ::: ## Predicted Probabilities - Let's just check each other's code and probabilities - What would your predicted probabilities look like if you had a confounder? effect modifier? ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
10:00
``` ::: :::
